distilleries.name: Distillerie Jean Goyard
distilleries.classification: Ratafia Champenois IG, Marc de Champagne IG, Fine de la Marne
distilleries.description: Founded in Ay in 1911, Goyard is the reference distiller of Champagne spirits, supplying many houses with their marc, fine and ratafia, sold from its boutique.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pomace and lees distillation in copper stills; long ageing for the IG-classed spirits
distilleries.tasting_program: Boutique tastings of ratafia, marc and fine; full distillery visits arranged for groups, institutions and schools by appointment

distilleries.name: Distillerie Guillon
distilleries.address: Route de Verzy, Hameau de Vertuelle, 51150 Louvois, France
distilleries.classification: Esprit du Malt de la Montagne de Reims
distilleries.description: Created in 1997 inside the Montagne de Reims Regional Natural Park forest, Guillon distils a malt-based Esprit du Malt and single malt whiskies.
distilleries.distillation_method: Malt mashing, fermentation and pot-still distillation, with extended oak ageing in the forest cellars
distilleries.tasting_program: Museum visit, distillery tour and professional tasting from around EUR 5 per person; booking advised

verified.address_quoted: Hameau de Vertuelle, Route de Verzy, 51150 Louvois

distilleries.name: Distillerie des Dames Blanches
distilleries.address: 3 bis rue Blanche de Castille, 51700 Jonquery, France
distilleries.classification: Single malt whisky, Gin, Ratafia Champenois, Fine de Champagne
distilleries.description: A family distillery in the Marne Valley founded by the Ammeux brothers on the former convent of Queen Blanche of Castille. Single malt whisky is made from barley.
distilleries.distillation_method: Single malt whisky distillation and ageing from farm-grown barley; small-batch gin and ratafia
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided visits of the still and ageing cellar with a tasting of whisky, gin, ratafia and fine, by reservation

verified.address_quoted: 3 bis rue Blanche de Castille, 51700 Jonquery

distilleries.name: Distillerie de Reims
distilleries.description: A craft gin distillery behind Reims Cathedral, distilling a ten-spice London-style gin in an Art Deco setting with a cathedral-view terrace.
distilleries.distillation_method: Small-batch botanical maceration and pot-still distillation of London-style gin
distilleries.tasting_program: Gin-creation workshop with tasting; visitors leave with their own custom bottle

verified.address_quoted: 15 cours Anatole France, behind Reims Cathedral
